# Resume Fire

Resume Fire Bot is a Telegram bot for Human + ATS analysis of PDF resumes.

## Pages

- https://resumefire.github.io/ - check a PDF resume online and open the Telegram bot.
- https://resumefire.github.io/human-ats-razbor-rezyume.html - methodology: why Human and ATS checks are separate.
- https://resumefire.github.io/proverit-rezyume-pered-otklikom.html - practical checklist before sending a resume.

## Product facts

- The bot provides a free preview before any full report purchase.
- It checks human readability and PDF/ATS parsing readiness.
- It does not guarantee employment, infer protected personal characteristics, or invent achievements.

## Primary action

https://t.me/ResumeFireBot?start=github-repo
